narrative:
Lexington township has 3,257 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.6 percentage points.
